mapper.select:
SELECT re.re_code, re.m_code, re.r_code, re.booker_name, re.reserved_at, re.check_in_date, re.check_out_date, re.original_price, re.discount_rate, re.final_price, re.cancel, re.cancel_date, re.review_status,
h.h_code, h.hotelName, h.discount, h.h_Img, h.city, h.country, h.type,
r.roomName,
m.m_email, m.m_pw, m.m_phone, m.m_birth, m.m_gender, m.m_nickName, m.m_coupon, m.m_regDate,
rb.rb_code, rb.rb_score
FROM reservation re INNER JOIN member m ON re.m_code = m.m_code INNER JOIN room r ON r.r_code = re.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code LEFT JOIN reviewboard rb ON rb.re_code = re.re_code AND rb.m_code = re.m_code WHERE m.m_email = #{m_email} ORDER BY re.check_out_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET cancel = 1, cancel_date = NOW() WHERE re_code = #{re_code}
